description: This blacksmithing plans is used for the Blacksmithing profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Plans: Greater Rune of Warding

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Plans: Greater Rune of Warding Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Blacksmithing (350) Requires Cenarion Expedition - Honored Use: Teaches you how to make a Greater Rune of Warding. Sell Price: 1 50 Greater Rune of Warding Item Level 70 Requires Level 60 Use: Enchant a piece of chest armor so it has a 25% chance per hit of giving you 400 points of physical damage absorption. 90 sec. cooldown. Lasts for 1 hour. Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 30 Requires Khorium Bar This blacksmithing plans is used for the Blacksmithing profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
